headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Overweight on Synchrony Financial, Lowers Price Target to $95
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Donald Fandetti   maintains Synchrony Financial (NYSE:SYF) with a Overweight and lowers the price target from $100 to $95.
